case_title: CATHERINE YOUNG VS. NIALL SEAN VIGNOLES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, CATHERINE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, CATHERINE
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NIALL SEAN VIGNOLES SET FOR APR-01-2009 IS CONTINUED TO APR-15-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN 506.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING AND TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR TIME CHANGE GRANTED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NIALL SEAN VIGNOLES SET FOR SEP-09-2009 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-30-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF FILED. PLAINTIFF WILL BE UNABLE TO ATTEND HEARING DUE TO WORK COMMITMENTS.

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-30-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, NO CORRESPONDANCE FROM PLAINTIFF AFTER SEPTEMBER 15, 2009. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT-DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. DEFENDANT ADVISED THAT HIS MOTION TO VACATE WILL NOT BE ADDRESSED IF HE DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. DEFENDANT STATES HE IS AWARE OF THIS AND LEFT THE COURTROOM. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,350.00 FILED BY YOUNG, CATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT VIGNOLES, NIALL SEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED NOV-17-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VIGNOLES, NIALL SEAN
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, CATHERINE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2009 - CONTINUED ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING TO FEB-19-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST FOR TIME CHANGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, CATHERINE
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NIALL SEAN VIGNOLES SET FOR MAY-12-2009 IS CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN 506.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NIALL SEAN VIGNOLES SET FOR MAY-12-2009 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-09-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY TELEPHONE, DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF WAS TO CALL THE CLERK AND ADVISE WHEN SHE WOULD BE RETURNING TO THE UNITED STATES, BUT DID NOT. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-20-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE DATE REQUESTED (JANUARY 19,2009) IS A COURT HOLIDAY.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2009 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, CATHERINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIGNOLES, NIALL SEAN $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $104.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,104.50, DEFENDANT NIALL SEAN VIGNOLES NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, CATHERINE
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT VIGNOLES, NIALL SEAN HEARING SET FOR APR-01-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NIALL SEAN VIGNOLES SET FOR APR-15-2009 IS CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN 506. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. DEFENDANT PRESENT IN COURT - DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM, HOWEVER DEFENDANT LEFT BEFORE A CONTINUANCE DATE WAS GIVEN. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DEFENDANT'S NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS. NEW ADDRESS IS: 2013-1/2 OAK ST. S.F. CA 94117.
